title: pleurogynella spathulata
intro: Pleurogynella spathulata, also known as the Spathulate Pleurogynella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pleurogynella spathulata are said to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its extracts in capsule or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
